meta.title: Datasets for Predictive & Preventative Care of Menopause-Related Osteoporosis
meta.purpose: Structured catalogue of observational cohorts, biobanks, imaging corpora, genomics resources, EHR/claims/registries, clinical trials, fracture registries, comorbidity cohorts, and lifestyle/wearable datasets for building risk-analysis and predictive modelling pipelines targeting post-menopausal bone loss and fractures.

relevance_scale.direct: Dataset explicitly captures menopause status AND bone outcomes
relevance_scale.indirect: Dataset captures one side (menopause OR bone) and supports modelling via feature engineering or external validation
relevance_scale.comparator: Male or paediatric dataset useful for pretraining, methods, or sex-stratified validation only

meta.suitability_scale: high | medium | low — subjective fit for post-menopausal fracture-risk / preventative-care modelling
meta.notes: URLs verified where feasible by six parallel research agents; where marked 'unknown' the field could not be confirmed and should be re-checked before committing. Costs are tiered: free | low | mid | high | very_high | unknown. Access types: open | application | controlled | commercial | federated | summary_only.

datasets.name: SWAN
datasets.full_name: Study of Women's Health Across the Nation

population.description: Caucasian, African-American, Japanese, Chinese, Hispanic pre/early-perimenopausal women

modalities: DXA (lumbar spine + proximal femur, annual at 5 sites)
reproductive hormones (FSH, E2, SHBG, inhibin B)
predictive_use_cases: peri-menopause bone loss trajectories stratified by ethnicity

access.notes: Most comprehensive menopause-transition bone cohort globally

strengths: annual DXA across the full transition

datasets.name: WHI
datasets.full_name: Women's Health Initiative (CT, OS, HT arms, Extension Studies)

population.description: Post-menopausal women in 3 overlapping arms: Observational Study, Clinical Trials (HT, CaD, DM), Extension Studies through 2020s

access.notes: Three tiers: BioLINCC (simpler, shallower), WHI Virtual Data Enclave (richest), dbGaP (genotype + phenotype). TOPMed includes WHI subset (phs001237).

limitations: CEE+MPA only — not bioidentical or transdermal
WHI OS must be separated from CT for uplift

datasets.name: SOF

access.notes: SOF Online for bone + NSRR for sleep — usually need both to link

strengths: unique combination of longitudinal DXA + actigraphy + adjudicated fractures

datasets.name: MrOS
datasets.full_name: Osteoporotic Fractures in Men Study (+ MrOS Sleep)
datasets.region: USA (6 centres) + Sweden + Hong Kong sub-cohorts

population.description: All-male comparator cohort with deep bone phenotyping

predictive_use_cases: DXA feature engineering with prospective outcomes

access.notes: Imaging release is partial; richer ancillary imaging via request

strengths: longitudinal prospective fracture outcomes linked to multi-modal imaging

population.description: Randomly sampled community Canadians with serial DXA and fracture ascertainment

access.notes: 25+ year follow-up

datasets.name: GLOW
datasets.full_name: Global Longitudinal Study of Osteoporosis in Women

access.notes: Dataset is mature/closed; access via historical PIs

datasets.name: OSTPRE
datasets.full_name: Kuopio Osteoporosis Risk Factor and Prevention Study

population.description: Finnish peri/post-menopausal women followed with serial DXA

access.notes: One of the longest running peri/post-menopausal bone cohorts globally

datasets.name: ALSWH
datasets.full_name: Australian Longitudinal Study on Women's Health

population.description: Three generations of Australian women with linked PBS/MBS claims

access.notes: Strong claims linkage

strengths: prospective menopause transition in youngest cohort

datasets.name: MsFLASH
datasets.full_name: Menopause Strategies Finding Lasting Answers for Symptoms and Health Network

population.description: Peri/post-menopausal women in vasomotor symptom trials

modalities: RCTs of HRT, SSRIs, yoga, exercise, CBT

population.description: Australian-born women traversing menopause with hormonal and bone outcomes

access.notes: Contact PI

datasets.name: Framingham Osteoporosis Study
datasets.full_name: Framingham Osteoporosis Study (ancillary to Framingham Heart + Offspring)

population.description: Framingham Heart participants with added bone phenotyping

access.notes: Deep cardiometabolic linkage
Dutch collaborator required

datasets.name: UK Biobank
datasets.full_name: UK Biobank (core cohort + imaging + accelerometer substudies)

population.description: UK residents with deep multimodal phenotyping

modalities: linked HES + primary care + cancer + death registry

access.cost: mid (access fee £6k+ plus DNAnexus RAP compute)
access.notes: Raw accelerometer files only on RAP

strengths: deep genotype + imaging + EHR + accelerometer integration
limitations: heel QUS not DXA for most

datasets.name: All of Us
datasets.full_name: NIH All of Us Research Program

population.description: Oversampled for under-represented groups; includes women of diverse ancestries

access.notes: Tiered workbench access; no patient-level export

datasets.name: FinnGen

population.description: Finnish biobank samples linked to nationwide health registries

modalities: linked Finnish national registries (Hilmo, Kela, Cancer, Cause of Death)

access.notes: Public summary statistics; IPD via Finnish Biobank applications

datasets.name: CKB
bone_variables: incident fractures via ICD-10 hospital episodes
predictive_use_cases: Han Chinese PRS validation (demonstrated for European BMD PRS predicting Chinese fractures)

access.turnaround: Data Access Committee reviews every ~2 months
access.notes: DAA with Oxford for non-China applicants
Ethics committee + contract required

population.description: Hospital-based Japanese biobank with multi-disease ascertainment

access.cost: free (summary via PheWeb); controlled (IPD via EGA)
access.notes: Summary stats https://pheweb.jp/
Access restricted to VA researchers/collaborators

datasets.name: MCPS

population.description: 2/3 female cohort — unusual strength for postmenopausal modelling

bone_variables: fracture via death certificate and EHR linkage

access.notes: Governed by Oxford CTSU
Active bone GWAS publications (2024+)

datasets.name: Qatar Biobank
predictive_use_cases: Middle-Eastern ancestry BMD discovery (Al-Barghouthi 2021 identified 15 BMD variants)

access.notes: Controlled access with scientific + ethics review

datasets.name: H3Africa / AWI-Gen
datasets.full_name: Human Heredity and Health in Africa Consortium / Africa Wits-INDEPTH Partnership for Genomic Studies

population.description: Sub-Saharan African cohorts; AWI-Gen bone sub-project has ~5,500 women

modalities: DXA and QUS in AWI-Gen subsets

access.turnaround: months via individual project DACs (e.g., AWI-Gen EGAS00001002482)

strengths: only large-scale African-ancestry resource for bone genetics

datasets.name: CLSA

population.description: National aging cohort with DXA substudy

access.notes: DAS committee review

strengths: DXA at scale in aging population

datasets.name: NHANES
datasets.full_name: National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (DXA, Dietary, Accelerometer modules)

population.description: Nationally representative with biennial waves since 1999

access.notes: Raw 80 Hz accelerometer files are 1+ TB/wave; nhanesaccel R package simplifies

strengths: DXA + diet + accelerometer + menopause in same survey
limitations: cross-sectional — no prospective fractures in public data

datasets.name: KNHANES
datasets.full_name: Korea National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey
modalities: femoral neck, total hip, lumbar DXA (cycles IV–V, 2008–11)
predictive_use_cases: BMD vs diet/PA in East-Asian postmenopausal women

access.notes: English portal available

datasets.name: VerSe

access.notes: CC BY 4.0; code https://github.com/anjany/verse; metadata including Genant grades and BMD released via linked Radiology: AI papers

strengths: only public CT dataset with Genant fracture grading + per-patient BMD

datasets.name: CTSpine1K
datasets.full_name: CTSpine1K: Large-Scale Dataset for Spinal Vertebrae Segmentation in CT
datasets.region: global (aggregated from COLONOG, HNSCC, MSD, COVID-19)
predictive_use_cases: segmentation pretraining for opportunistic CT screening
vertebral body localization before BMD extraction

access.notes: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0

strengths: largest public spine CT segmentation dataset

datasets.name: TotalSegmentator v2
modalities: vertebrae, vertebral bodies, intervertebral discs, femur, pelvis all labelled
predictive_use_cases: auto-segmentation for opportunistic CT BMD pipelines

access.notes: CC BY 4.0; pip install totalsegmentator

strengths: vertebra + hip + muscle labels enable joint bone/sarcopenia modelling

datasets.name: CTPelvic1K
datasets.full_name: CTPelvic1K: Large-Scale Pelvic CT Segmentation Dataset

population.description: Pelvic/abdominal CT volumes including fracture subset

modalities: lumbar spine + sacrum + bilateral hip labels
predictive_use_cases: pelvic bone segmentation for BMD extraction

access.notes: Uses source dataset licences

datasets.name: RSNA Cervical Spine 2022
datasets.full_name: RSNA 2022 Cervical Spine Fracture CT Dataset

access.notes: Expert spine subspecialist annotations

limitations: cervical only — fragility fractures are typically thoracolumbar

access.notes: Batch scripts provided by NIH

datasets.name: RadImageNet
modalities: large MSK MRI component including spine and hip

access.notes: Pretrained CNN weights publicly available on GitHub
Research-use agreement via Stanford AIMI

datasets.name: GRAZPEDWRI-DX
predictive_use_cases: transfer to adult distal radius fractures

access.notes: CC BY 4.0

datasets.name: FracAtlas

access.notes: CC BY 4.0

strengths: hip subset relevant to postmenopausal target

datasets.name: Knee X-ray Osteoporosis (Mendeley)

population.description: Paired knee radiograph + QUS + clinical covariates

modalities: knee radiographs with matched QUS T-scores

access.notes: CC BY 4.0; DOI 10.17632/fxjm8fb6mw.2

strengths: rare dataset with explicit menopause-age metadata

datasets.name: Hip Osteoporosis X-ray (Mendeley)
datasets.full_name: Automated Osteoporosis Classification Hip Radiograph Dataset (Taiwan)
modalities: plain hip radiographs matched to DXA T-scores
predictive_use_cases: opportunistic osteoporosis classification from plain hip X-ray

access.notes: DOI 10.17632/gmg3vvmvj4.1

datasets.name: fastMRI+
modalities: knee MRI 1.5T/3T with clinical pathology annotations
outcome_labels: 16,154 bounding-box annotations across 22 pathology categories incl. marrow edema

access.notes: fastMRI+ annotations on GitHub

datasets.name: MyoSegmenTUM Spine
modalities: chemical shift water-fat MRI (Dixon VIBE) of L1–L5
manual masks for vertebral bodies + paraspinal muscles

access.notes: Open with attribution

strengths: rare public chemical shift water-fat MRI of lumbar spine
limitations: healthy only, no DXA/fracture ground truth

access.notes: SpineWeb Dataset 15

datasets.name: SpineWeb Hub
modalities: segmentation / centroid / fracture grade / disc labels
predictive_use_cases: benchmark hub for spine model development

access.notes: Individual licences vary

datasets.name: OSTEODENT
datasets.full_name: OSTEODENT Project — Dental Panoramic + DXA Reference Cohort

population.description: Postmenopausal women with paired dental panoramic + DXA

predictive_use_cases: opportunistic osteoporosis screening from dental imaging

access.notes: No canonical public download; likely collaboration-only

strengths: gold-standard DXA-linked panoramic imaging in postmenopausal women

datasets.name: HR-pQCT (BoMIC)
datasets.full_name: Bone Microarchitecture International Consortium HR-pQCT holdings

population.description: Consortium of HR-pQCT centres; published normative datasets exist (e.g., Franco-Swiss reference N=43 young women)

access.notes: No open raw-image release verified

limitations: small N in public reference cohorts

datasets.name: OAI

population.description: Longitudinal OA cohort with bone imaging

predictive_use_cases: transfer learning for bone imaging models

access.notes: NIMH Data Archive

datasets.name: GEFOS

population.description: Meta-analyses of heel eBMD + DXA BMD + fracture

access.notes: Hosts Estrada 2012, Zheng 2015, Medina-Gomez 2018, Morris 2019; mirrored in IEU OpenGWAS

limitations: heel eBMD proxies true DXA BMD imperfectly

datasets.name: UKB eBMD GWAS (Morris 2019)
datasets.full_name: UK Biobank heel eBMD & Fracture GWAS (Morris 2019, Nat Genet)

access.notes: Individual-level UKB requires separate application

limitations: heel QUS is estimate not gold-standard DXA

population.description: WGS-imputed Icelanders ~150k; tens of thousands of fracture cases

access.notes: Styrkarsdottir forearm fracture atlas Nat Genet 2023

datasets.name: ReproGen ANM
datasets.full_name: ReproGen Age at Natural Menopause GWAS (Ruth 2021)

population.description: European women + East-Asian replication up to 225,200

predictive_use_cases: ANM PRS as feature in bone-loss models

access.notes: Ruth 2021 Nature PMID 34349265

datasets.name: PGS Catalog
datasets.full_name: PGS Catalog — Bone, Fracture & Menopause entries

access.notes: Key BMD entries PGS000121, PGS000122; high-AUC family PGS002632, PGS002681, PGS001955. Use pgsc_calc pipeline. EFO_0003923 (BMD), EFO_0004681 (ANM)

datasets.name: IEU OpenGWAS

population.description: Aggregator of thousands of harmonised GWAS studies

predictive_use_cases: Mendelian randomization (menopause → BMD, estradiol → fracture, HRT → bone)

access.notes: R package TwoSampleMR; API + Python clients

limitations: mirrored data can lag primary sources

datasets.name: GWAS Catalog

access.notes: EFO_0003923 BMD; EFO_0003882 osteoporosis; EFO_0004339 fracture; EFO_0004681 ANM. Summary stats at https://www.ebi.ac.uk/gwas/downloads/summary-statistics

strengths: canonical index for all public GWAS

datasets.name: GTEx
outcome_labels: eQTL / sQTL for genes in BMD loci

access.notes: Muscle, subcutaneous adipose, whole blood are bone-adjacent proxies

datasets.name: Bone scRNA Atlases
datasets.full_name: Human bone marrow & femoral head single-cell transcriptomic atlases

population.description: Tens of donors across published atlases

predictive_use_cases: cell-type-specific enrichment of BMD GWAS signal

access.notes: Query CELLxGENE and Human Cell Atlas for 'bone' and 'bone marrow stromal'

datasets.name: DNAmMenoAge
predictive_use_cases: biological-age residual as predictor of post-menopausal bone loss

access.notes: methylclock R package; Horvath 2013, PhenoAge, GrimAge

strengths: real-time biological readout complementing genetic ANM
limitations: needs methylation data in target cohort

access.notes: Contributed to Morris 2019 fracture meta

datasets.name: TOPMed
outcome_labels: varies — includes WHI, CHS, ARIC with fracture/BMD/menopause data

access.notes: dbGaP phs001368 umbrella; WHI within phs001237; BRAVO provides allele frequencies openly

datasets.name: CPRD Aurum
menopause_variables: HRT prescriptions (oestradiol, CEE, tibolone, combined patches)

access.notes: Aurum distinct from GOLD with larger EMIS footprint
Must work with a Nottingham-affiliated PI; TRE-based analysis

datasets.name: IQVIA MRD (THIN)
datasets.full_name: IQVIA Medical Research Data UK (formerly THIN)
predictive_use_cases: pharmacoepidemiology of HRT and anti-osteoporosis drugs

access.notes: THIN retired as standalone brand

datasets.name: TriNetX
bone_variables: BMD lab values in some nodes

access.notes: Patient-level requires site DUAs

datasets.name: Epic Cosmos
bone_variables: DXA orders and results with T-scores where structured

access.notes: Must be at an Epic customer organisation
Rebranded under Oracle Health

datasets.name: PCORnet
datasets.full_name: PCORnet National Patient-Centered Clinical Research Network

access.notes: Requires coordinating centre engagement
PCORnet node

datasets.name: VA CDW
predictive_use_cases: fracture risk in ageing women veterans

access.notes: VA appointment required; analysis inside VINCI

datasets.name: Kaiser Permanente Research Bank
predictive_use_cases: integrated care system fracture pathway modelling

access.notes: Non-KP researchers need KP collaborator

datasets.name: Swedish NPR + Rikshöft
datasets.full_name: Swedish National Patient Register + RIKSHÖFT + Prescribed Drug Register
predictive_use_cases: national fracture risk models with complete follow-up

access.notes: Swedish collaborator + ethics approval

datasets.name: Danish National Registers
datasets.full_name: Danish National Patient Register + Danish Fracture Database + Prescription Registry
bone_variables: all fracture types with anatomical detail

access.notes: Remote TRE Forskermaskinen; Danish collaborator usually needed

datasets.name: Norwegian Registers
datasets.full_name: Norwegian Hip Fracture Register + NorPD + NPR
predictive_use_cases: hip fracture incidence and post-op mortality modelling

access.notes: Helseanalyseplattformen increasingly used

datasets.name: HES + NHS SDE
datasets.full_name: Hospital Episode Statistics + NHS England Secure Data Environment
bone_variables: inpatient fracture episodes with OPCS procedures
predictive_use_cases: care pathway and hospital outcome analysis

access.notes: SDE emerging as default access route

datasets.name: ICES Ontario

access.notes: Requires ICES-appointed scientist or adjunct

strengths: strong osteoporosis care gap publication track record

datasets.name: RAMQ Quebec
datasets.full_name: RAMQ (Régie de l'assurance maladie du Québec)

access.notes: CAI + ISQ approval

limitations: only public plan enrollees for drugs

datasets.name: OHDSI Network
datasets.full_name: Observational Health Data Sciences and Informatics (OMOP CDM federation)
predictive_use_cases: PLP (Patient Level Prediction) package for fracture risk
LEGEND-style comparative effectiveness of anti-osteoporosis drugs

access.turnaround: immediate for tools; site-specific for execution
access.notes: Open-source R packages (PLP, CohortMethod, Strategus)

datasets.name: Optum / MarketScan / Medicare 5%
datasets.full_name: Optum Clinformatics + IBM MarketScan + Medicare 5% Sample
menopause_variables: HRT, SERM, bisphosphonate, denosumab, romosozumab claims

access.notes: Medicare 5% Sample available via CMS ResDAC at lower cost for academics

datasets.name: PharMetrics Plus
menopause_variables: HRT, SERM, bisphosphonate, denosumab, romosozumab claims

access.notes: Commercial licence

datasets.name: JMDC
datasets.full_name: JMDC Claims Database (Japan Medical Data Center)
menopause_variables: HRT, bisphosphonate, denosumab, teriparatide, romosozumab dispensing
predictive_use_cases: early post-menopausal modelling in employer-insured Japanese women

datasets.name: Taiwan NHIRD
datasets.full_name: Taiwan National Health Insurance Research Database / HWDC

access.notes: On-site HWDC analysis only; Taiwanese collaborator required

datasets.name: Korea NHIS + K-CaMos
datasets.full_name: Korean National Health Insurance Service Database + K-CaMos
menopause_variables: HRT, bisphosphonate, denosumab, SERM, romosozumab dispensing
predictive_use_cases: national post-menopausal fracture risk with screening biomarkers

access.notes: On-site analysis in Wonju or Seoul; Korean collaborator required

strengths: national coverage + linked biennial screening — rare globally

datasets.name: eMERGE
datasets.full_name: eMERGE Network (Electronic Medical Records and Genomics)
predictive_use_cases: EHR phenotype library (PheKB) for fracture and menopause definitions

access.notes: Use PheKB algorithms independent of eMERGE access
Apache 2.0; FHIR/CSV/CCDA outputs

datasets.name: EHDS / DARWIN EU
datasets.full_name: European Health Data Space / DARWIN EU
menopause_variables: HRT, anti-osteoporosis, fracture, DXA concepts standardised
predictive_use_cases: EU-wide regulatory-grade studies on osteoporosis drugs

access.notes: EHDS Regulation rollout 2025–2029
Aggregate hospital-level CSV annually on data.gov.uk; patient-level requires NHFD board + HRA ethics

datasets.name: ANZHFR
datasets.full_name: Australian & New Zealand Hip Fracture Registry

access.notes: Well-documented data dictionary v17

strengths: clean access pathway vs European registries

datasets.name: Scottish HFA
outcome_labels: Scottish Standards of Care for Hip Fracture Patients

access.notes: Linkable in eDRIS to SMR01, PIS prescribing, NRS deaths
Linkable via PADRIS to SIDIAP primary care EHR

datasets.name: FLS-DB (UK)

population.description: ~90,000 fragility fracture patients/year across ~80+ FLS services since 2016

predictive_use_cases: predicting treatment initiation after sentinel fracture

access.notes: flsdb@rcp.ac.uk

strengths: direct focus on post-fracture care pathway
only national FLS audit globally at this scale

datasets.name: IOF Capture the Fracture
datasets.full_name: IOF Capture the Fracture / Map of Best Practice
predictive_use_cases: FLS quality as site-level covariate for hierarchical models

access.notes: Public map; not patient-level

datasets.name: Vivli
datasets.full_name: Vivli — Center for Global Clinical Research Data
modalities: sponsor-contributed RCT IPD in secure enclave

access.notes: Hosts Amgen (FREEDOM, FRAME, ARCH, STRUCTURE), Novartis (HORIZON), Lilly (MORE, RUTH, teriparatide), Merck (FIT, FLEX), Roche (BONE). Secure enclave only — no IPD download. Cross-sponsor pooling requires separate DUAs.

strengths: largest bone-trial holding under one access point
limitations: re-identification rules prohibit linkage to external cohorts

datasets.name: CSDR

access.notes: Most requests now routed through Vivli. Lilly uses CSDR for MORE/CORE/RUTH/teriparatide. Consent-scope denials documented.

limitations: Lilly has denied requests on consent grounds

datasets.name: YODA
modalities: J&J + other sponsor trials in SAS Solutions OnDemand enclave

datasets.name: BioLINCC
datasets.full_name: NHLBI Biologic Specimen and Data Repository Information Coordinating Center

access.notes: Curated subset of WHI (CT+OS), HERS/HERS II, MESA, Framingham, CARDIA, ARIC, CHS

limitations: curated WHI subset shallower than WHI VDE/dbGaP

access.notes: Includes Prolia/Xgeva, Evenity, Aclasta, Tymlos. No IPD.

datasets.name: Medidata Synthetic Control Arm
predictive_use_cases: synthetic placebo arm for new trial design

access.notes: No confirmed osteoporosis SCA product as of 2026

datasets.name: FIT + FLEX
datasets.full_name: Fracture Intervention Trial (FIT I + FIT II + FLEX extension)

population.description: FIT I 2,027 vertebral fx arm + FIT II 4,432 clinical fx arm; FLEX 1,099

access.notes: Merck → Vivli; sponsor: Merck; intervention: alendronate 5→10 mg/day vs placebo

datasets.name: HORIZON-PFT + HORIZON-RFT
datasets.full_name: HORIZON Pivotal Fracture Trial + Recurrent Fracture Trial

access.notes: Sponsor: Novartis; intervention: zoledronic acid 5 mg IV yearly vs placebo; IPD released for replication

strengths: only IV bisphosphonate trial with hard mortality endpoint

access.notes: Sponsor: Amgen; intervention: denosumab 60 mg SC q6mo vs placebo

datasets.name: FRAME
datasets.full_name: FRAME (Fracture Study in Postmenopausal Women with Osteoporosis)
outcome_labels: new vertebral fracture at 12 and 24 months

access.notes: Sponsor: Amgen/UCB/Astellas; romosozumab 210 mg SC monthly × 12 mo → denosumab

datasets.name: ARCH
datasets.full_name: ARCH (Active-controlled Fracture Study in Postmenopausal Women at High Risk)
predictive_use_cases: CV adverse-event prediction in bone therapy

access.notes: Sponsor: Amgen/UCB; romosozumab × 12 mo → alendronate vs alendronate → alendronate

strengths: high-risk population closest to real-world FLS patients

datasets.name: MORE + CORE
datasets.full_name: Multiple Outcomes of Raloxifene Evaluation + Continuing Outcomes Relevant to Evista
predictive_use_cases: joint bone + breast cancer outcome modelling

access.notes: Sponsor: Lilly; raloxifene 60 or 120 mg vs placebo 3 y + CORE extension 4 y. Lilly consent-scope denials documented

datasets.name: RUTH

access.notes: Sponsor: Lilly; raloxifene 60 mg vs placebo, median 5.6 y; Lilly consent caveats

strengths: adjudicated hard CV and fracture endpoints

datasets.name: BONE + MOBILE + DIVA

access.notes: Sponsor: Roche/GSK; ibandronate oral or intermittent vs placebo

strengths: intermittent-dosing arm is natural adherence experiment

datasets.name: VERT + HIP
datasets.full_name: Vertebral Efficacy with Risedronate Therapy + HIP trial
outcome_labels: hip fracture (HIP — only RCT powered primarily for hip)

access.notes: Data custody murky post P&G → Warner Chilcott → Allergan/AbbVie; not on Vivli

strengths: only RCT powered for hip fracture as primary

access.notes: Sponsor: Radius/Ipsen; no public data-sharing policy as of Q1 2026
Sponsor: Lilly; teriparatide 20 or 40 µg SC daily vs placebo, median 19 mo (stopped early for osteosarcoma signal in rats)
Secondary-prevention CV population

datasets.name: KEEPS
datasets.full_name: Kronos Early Estrogen Prevention Study + KEEPS Continuation

population.age_range: 42–58 at entry; 6 mo–3 yr since natural menopause

access.notes: Mayo/Kronos collaborator model

strengths: randomized HT exposure (oral CEE vs transdermal E2)

datasets.name: ELITE
datasets.full_name: Early vs Late Intervention Trial with Estradiol

access.notes: USC collaborator model

datasets.name: Million Women Study
predictive_use_cases: real-world HRT exposure effect on fracture

access.notes: Oxford Population Health collaborator model

datasets.name: MESA
modalities: thoracic vertebral BMD from chest CT (MESA-Abdominal BC)

access.notes: dbGaP + BioLINCC

datasets.name: ARIC
predictive_use_cases: long follow-up (35+ yrs) shared risk modelling

datasets.name: CARDIA
datasets.full_name: Coronary Artery Risk Development in Young Adults
predictive_use_cases: life-course pre-menopausal risk factor mapping onto post-menopausal outcomes

population.description: Largest single-site African American CV cohort

datasets.name: WHIMS + WHIMS-Y
datasets.full_name: WHI Memory Study + WHIMS of Younger Women
modalities: RCT HT (CEE or CEE+MPA) + cognitive testing
bone_variables: inherited from WHI parent: DXA subset (~11k), adjudicated hip fractures
limitations: WHIMS enrolled 65+ (missed critical window — WHIMS-Y addresses)

datasets.name: Health ABC
datasets.full_name: Health, Aging and Body Composition Study
bone_variables: adjudicated incident hip/non-spine fractures over 10+ yr

access.notes: NIA DUA

strengths: DXA + CT + muscle function in same women

access.notes: Collaboration DUA

datasets.name: SHARE
datasets.full_name: Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe

datasets.name: TILDA
datasets.full_name: The Irish Longitudinal Study on Ageing

datasets.name: HRS
menopause_variables: limited menopause status, HRT in some waves

datasets.name: InterLACE
datasets.full_name: International Collaboration for a Life Course Approach to Reproductive Health and Chronic Disease Events
bone_variables: varies; some component cohorts have DXA/fractures
limitations: not all cohorts contribute bone data

datasets.name: BCAC
predictive_use_cases: shared reproductive risk factors across breast cancer + bone
MR studies of age at menopause

datasets.name: AWI-Gen / MASC
datasets.full_name: Africa Wits-INDEPTH Partnership for Genomic Studies / Middle-Aged Soweto Cohort
datasets.region: 4 sub-Saharan African countries; MASC in Soweto

population.description: MASC subcohort N=510 women with longitudinal bone data

predictive_use_cases: external validation in Black African women (major gap)
strengths: rare longitudinal bone data in African women

datasets.name: REDLINC
datasets.full_name: Collaborative Group for Research of the Climacteric in Latin America

population.description: Tens of thousands across 13+ multinational studies

bone_variables: limited; some studies report self-reported osteoporosis
predictive_use_cases: external validation in Latin American women
strengths: only major Latin American menopause network

datasets.name: CURES
predictive_use_cases: external validation in Asian Indian women (low BMI, high diabetes phenotype)

datasets.name: POI Registries
datasets.full_name: Premature Ovarian Insufficiency Registries (NIH POI, FXPOI, St Jude LIFE)

population.description: Hundreds to low thousands per registry; POI prevalence ~3.5%

modalities: DXA at 5-year intervals in NIH POI protocol

datasets.name: UKB Accelerometer
modalities: Axivity AX3 wrist-worn triaxial accelerometer, 100 Hz, ±8 g, 7 days continuous raw
bone_variables: heel QUS at baseline (not at accel wear)

access.notes: Raw CWA files via DNAnexus RAP; OxWearables-processed summaries also available

datasets.name: SOF Sleep (NSRR)

population.description: Parent SOF n=9,704; sleep visit age ~84

access.notes: NSRR for sleep + SOF Online for bone — need both

strengths: only large female cohort with actigraphy + longitudinal DXA + adjudicated fractures

datasets.name: WSC
modalities: WSC menopause substudy with 6-month PSG cadence

datasets.name: LIFE Study
datasets.full_name: Lifestyle Interventions and Independence for Elders
modalities: hip-worn ActiGraph 7-day wear at baseline, 6, 12, 24 mo
strengths: randomised PA intervention with wearable follow-up

datasets.name: Fenland
strengths: best PA energy-expenditure validation cohort globally

datasets.name: mPower
datasets.full_name: Sage Bionetworks Parkinson's Disease mHealth Study
modalities: smartphone accelerometer + gyroscope 20-s walk and tap tasks
predictive_use_cases: smartphone gait features for fall-risk models

datasets.name: FARSEEING

population.description: 208 verified real-world fall events in community-dwelling older adults

modalities: tri-axial accelerometer (lower back or thigh), 20 or 100 Hz
predictive_use_cases: the benchmark for real-world fall detection training

access.notes: 22 records openly downloadable; full set via collaborative agreement

strengths: only dataset of real, in-the-wild falls from older adults — ground truth is precious

datasets.name: SisFall
predictive_use_cases: supervised fall classifier training (most cited open fall dataset)
limitations: most falls simulated by young adults

datasets.name: NHANES Dietary
bone_variables: femoral neck + whole-body DXA in cycles 1999–2006, 2013–14, 2017–18

access.notes: Link dietary, demo, DXA, PAM by SEQN

datasets.name: NDNS
datasets.full_name: UK National Diet and Nutrition Survey (Rolling Programme)
predictive_use_cases: UK reference intakes for calcium/vit D/protein

datasets.name: EPIC-Oxford / Norfolk
predictive_use_cases: 17.6-year mean follow-up for diet → fracture risk
strengths: gold-standard long-term fracture follow-up with quality FFQ

datasets.name: NutriNet-Santé
predictive_use_cases: diet pattern trajectories in midlife women

datasets.name: CHNS
predictive_use_cases: calcium intake distributions in Asian women
limitations: no bone imaging or fracture follow-up

datasets.name: Gateway to Global Aging Grip
datasets.full_name: Harmonized SHARE / ELSA / TILDA / HRS Grip Strength
menopause_variables: reproductive history modules vary by wave

datasets.name: LIFTMOR + MEDEX-OP
datasets.full_name: LIFTMOR RCT + MEDEX-OP RCT (HiRIT in postmenopausal women)

population.description: LIFTMOR 101 + MEDEX-OP 115 postmenopausal women with low bone mass

predictive_use_cases: 'what actually works' ground-truth training label for exercise-bone response
strengths: rare robust demonstration of BMD gains in low-BMD postmenopausal women
MEDEX-OP is the only RCT testing exercise × bone-drug interaction

datasets.name: Too Fit To Fracture
datasets.full_name: Too Fit To Fracture Delphi Consensus & RCT Programme

population.description: Delphi panel + derivative RCTs; Build Better Bones 2020 RCT n=141

predictive_use_cases: endorsed safe-exercise guidelines — expert-derived labels for rule-based priors

datasets.name: Clue / 4M Consortium
modalities: self-tracked menstrual/menopause symptoms, mood, sleep, activity
predictive_use_cases: free-living menopause symptom phenotyping at scale
